title: Neomammillaria arida
taxonomy: Neomammillaria arida is a species of cactus within the family Cactaceae. It belongs to the genus Neomammillaria, which has been reclassified as part of the genus Mammillaria. The classification of Neomammillaria arida is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Order: Caryophyllales, Family: Cactaceae, Genus: Mammillaria, Species: M. arida. The species is native to Mexico and is a type of small, globular cactus. It is often found growing in clusters and produces white flowers.

This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, wounds, and digestive issues, due to its potential health benefits in reducing oxidative stress and promoting healing.
